cover:
A high-quality architectural system block diagram illustrating the "PROMPT ENGINEERING FOR SALESFORCE ADMINS".
Overall Theme: Technical architecture map, clean flow chart, analytical, educational, modern and well-structured layout.
Background: A very clean, subtle light gray background with faint grid lines.

Header:
- At the top-center, a massive dark bold rounded header block displaying "PROMPT ENGINEERING FOR SALESFORCE ADMINS".
- Below the title, a small subtitle: "prompt engineering salesforce admins".
- In the top-right corner, a small circular profile icon labeled "Bennie Joseph | Architect".

Architecture Layers (Arranged hierarchically with clear connections):
- A "Input & Context" container (colored in neon blue) containing modules: "Tool Registry", "Memory Store", "Salesforce CRM", "Prompt Builder".
- A "LLM / Reasoning Engine" container (colored in neon green) containing modules: "Model: claude-sonnet-4-7 / gpt-5.5", "tool_use blocks", "Structured JSON output", "200K context".
- A "Execution & Audit" container (colored in grey) containing modules: "Output Handler", "Validation Layer", "Audit Logger", "Kill Switch".
- A central block at the heart of the system labeled "Agent Loop — runAgent()" with a rotating arrow icon. This central node has multiple dotted directional connector lines feeding into and out of all surrounding layers.
- An "INTEGRATION LAYER" box on the upper right with modules "Anthropic API / OpenAI API" and "Salesforce REST API v64.0".
- A bottom panel labeled "AGENT METRICS" with sub-modules "Tool Call Accuracy", "Cost per Run", "Hallucination Rate".

Style Details: Technical blueprint style, clean rounded rectangle containers, precise dotted lines with arrowheads showing control and data flow, soft pastel color scheme (pale yellows, soft blues, light greens, and dark blues), micro vector icons inside each block, neat modern sans-serif fonts, absolutely crisp rendering, no blurred elements, zero spelling mistakes, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: System architecture diagram: 'Prompt Engineering for Salesforce Admins in Agentforce 2.0'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Prompt Engineering for Salesforce Admins'. Subtitle 'How grounded prompts move from Salesforce data to safe agent actions'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Salesforce Context' (pastel blue): modules 'Case Fields', 'Account Entitlements', 'Knowledge Articles'. LAYER 2 'Prompt Design' (pastel green): modules 'Role', 'Rules', 'Output Contract'. LAYER 3 'Agentforce 2.0 Execution' (pastel purple): modules 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2', 'Flow Actions', 'Human Handoff'. Central node 'Grounded Prompt Template' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'Data Cloud Vector Search' and 'Salesforce API v64.0'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Admin Controls': sub-modules 'Testing', 'Versioning', 'Audit Logs' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.

Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Weak Prompts vs Production Salesforce Prompts'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'WEAK PROMPT' (soft red/grey, bold blue-grey header box): blocks for 'Vague task: summarize this case', 'No data boundaries', 'Free-text output creates automation risk' each with small icon. Central flow diagram showing tangled lines between Case, Email, Flow, Agent. RIGHT COLUMN 'PRODUCTION PROMPT' (soft green/blue, bright blue header box): blocks for 'Grounded Salesforce fields', 'Explicit business rules', 'JSON output contract'. Central glowing node 'Single Source of Truth' with clean straight lines to Case, Entitlement, Knowledge Article. Speedometer labeled FAST pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.
